scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "bun run --filter @nuncio/server dev" "bun run --filter @nuncio/web dev"
scripts.build: bun run --filter @nuncio/server build && bun run --filter @nuncio/web build
scripts.lint: bun run --filter @nuncio/server lint && bun run --filter @nuncio/web lint
